content: Planner, deleted .agents/memory-bank/ (all 6 files) -- this reverses a committed change (883b4d8), not an untracked stub.

Planner, rewrote brief-session.md: 'Memory Bank Convention' -> 'Session Brief Convention', explicitly documents the unwind and cites this trail plus the original ceo/4cf2171d objection. Replaced the 6-file hand-maintained convention with a single generated SESSION-BRIEF.md, fully overwritten each run, sourced only from the Round Table pass -- no separate read/accumulate step. Also fixed frontmatter description line, which still referenced the Memory Bank.
Planner, preserved Round Table mechanics (roster walk, hand-off playback from fe7be6ff) untouched -- only the output/persistence target changed, per your plan step 4.
Planner, added a 'What Not To Do' bullet forbidding resurrection of a hand-maintained memory-bank/ convention without a fresh /ceo:approve-initiative cycle, so this doesn't silently regress again.
Planner, this cycle deleted committed files and edited catalog/brief-session.md -- per hil-gating.md, not self-sealing accept. Handing to Checker.
